localization.name: Quick Thrust
localization.description:
300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. If the user already has Stealth, all other allies will be granted Stealth and a Stealth Shield instead.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.
localization.selected:
300% damage, grants Stealth & Shield
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Lethal Downfall
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 450% damage instead if the enemy has 1 Guardian on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the enemy has 2+ Guardians on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then, if that enemy is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU.

This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with another attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.
localization.selected:
300%+ damage, may Poison
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Knighted in Stealth
localization.description:
Immediately give all other allies that have a Stealth Strike type active skill or Stealth the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Then grants all allies Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

Usable if 2+ allies on the battlefield have Stealth. This skill is locked for 50TU after use. Usable 3 times per battle.
localization.selected:
Grants Stealth, may reduce TU
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Earthen Smite
localization.description:
400% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead to targets that are poisoned or sleeping. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

Then non-burning targets hit are randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.
